calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-11-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 11:37am
Judge David Porter, clerk Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 414.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Emil Nudelman appears through counsel Svetlana Shirinova with interpreter Alyona Bagriy. Respondent Vladislav Chernoguz appears in pro per with Jerry Zerzezny. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Porter.
